stem: A competitive diver dives from a platform into the water. The graph shown gives the height above the water y, in meters, of the diver x seconds after diving from the platform. What is the best interpretation of the x-intercept of the graph?
choices: The diver reaches a maximum height above the water at 1.6 seconds.
The diver hits the water at 1.6 seconds.
The diver reaches a maximum height above the water at 0.2 seconds.
The diver hits the water at 0.2 seconds.
answer: The diver hits the water at 1.6 seconds.
explanation: The x-intercept is where the height y equals 0, meaning the diver is at water level. The graph crosses the x-axis at about 1.6 seconds, so that is when the diver hits the water. The choices about maximum height describe the top of the curve, not the x-intercept.
